name: kensho-monorepo
description: Kensho — open-source test report generator. Part of the KaizenReport platform.

scripts.demo: pnpm --filter playwright-demo run seed && pnpm --filter @kaizenreport/kensho run generate --input ../../examples/playwright-demo/kensho-results --output ../../examples/playwright-demo/kensho-report && pnpm --filter @kaizenreport/kensho run open --report ../../examples/playwright-demo/kensho-report
